Wednesday.breakfast: Scrambled eggs + whole wheat toast + apples
Wednesday.lunch: Macaroni & cheese (1 box made) + apple slices
Wednesday.dinner: Shredded chicken tacos with cheese, tomato, sour cream + frozen corn
Wednesday.helpers: Lauren: Defrost 2 lbs ground beef in fridge (for Thursday) — JP: Lead taco assembly & warm chicken — Joseph: Warm corn & set table — Michael: Pour drinks & help with toppings

Thursday.dinner: Ground beef pasta with spaghetti sauce + Caesar salad
Thursday.helpers: Lauren: Defrost 1 pie crust in fridge (for Friday) — JP: Brown ground beef & manage sauce — Joseph: Cook pasta & toss salad — Michael: Grate Parmesan & set table

Friday.breakfast: Scrambled eggs + whole wheat toast + apple
Friday.dinner: Spinach pie + instant mashed potatoes + canned green beans
Friday.helpers: Lauren: Defrost Cajun sausages in fridge (for Saturday) — Joseph: Prepare spinach filling & assemble pie — Michael: Pour green beans into pot & help set table

Saturday.dinner: Cajun sausages + wild rice + sautéed frozen mixed vegetables
Saturday.helpers: Lauren: Heat sausages & sauté vegetables — JP: Cook wild rice — Joseph: Assist with timing — Michael: Set table & pour drinks

Sunday.lunch: Pulled pork + instant mashed potatoes + canned carrots
Sunday.dinner: Red lentil soup + whole wheat bread
Sunday.helpers: Lauren: Batch-cook lentil soup base (post-Mass), cook barley or quinoa for next week — JP: Assist with soup prep — Joseph: Assist with batch cooking — Michael: Stir soup (with supervision)
